name: Kaori - The MILF With A Gassy Surprise
description:
Your coworker Kaori is as sweet as candy and as hot as a jalapeño! Speaking of jalapeños, seems she's quite fond of foods that make her stomach gurgle. And when she invites you over to her place, you'll soon find out why...

⚠️⚠️FART, DOMINATION WARNING⚠️⚠️
